title: Animal Control - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Animal Control 27 Matching Service Providers BENTON COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services, including public records requests, emergency management, search and rescue operations, dispatch services, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services, including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 180 NW 5th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration and law enforcement services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Animal Control: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 766-6858 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ALBANY CITY OF ALBANY POLICE DEPARTMENT ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services which includes responding to reports of animal cruelty, stray pets, and local animal code violations. 2600 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 917-7680 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF BAKER CITY CITY OF BAKER CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services such as responding to reports of animal cruelty, stray pets, and local animal code violations. 1768 Auburn Avenue Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 523-6415 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF BEND REPORT AN ISSUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation with a focus on health and safety. Types of issues that can be reported but are not limited to building or land use violations, animal control, illegal dumping or excessive trash, graffiti, street maintenance, camping in the public right of way (including those in vehicles), noise complaints, abandoned vehicles, and public utility issues. 710 NW Wall Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 693-6911 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF BOARDMAN ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services such as responding to reports of local animal code violations and dog licensing. Do not respond to reports of at large chickens. 200 City Center Circle Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 676-5317 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF EUGENE CITY OF EUGENE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, fields complaints, issues dog licenses, and enforces Eugene Animal Code. 300 Country Club Road Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 687-4060 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ONTARIO CITY OF ONTARIO POLICE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides muncipal police and animal control services. 444 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 881-3237 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF THE DALLES CITY OF THE DALLES POLICE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Municipal police for the City of The Dalles including Animal Control. 401 Court Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 296-2233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption of dogs, picks up strays, handles nuisance complaints, and provides licensing services. Also offers microchipping and rabies vaccinations for licensed dogs. 13141 SE Highway 212 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Adoption Viewing: Tuesday-Friday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 655-8628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLATSOP COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL AND SHELTER ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and protection for homeless, unwanted, abandoned, abused, or neglected dogs and cats. Responds to complaints of stray and nuisance dogs, dog bites, and reports of animal abuse. Also offers cat and dog adoptions. 1315 SE 19th Street Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm (503) 861-0737 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services including search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal services, including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 901 Port Avenue Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Sunday 8:30am-noon and 12:30pm-4:30pm. Closed on major holidays. (503) 366-4611 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COOS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE COOS COUNTY ANIMAL CONTROL ANIMAL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, pet licensing, and maintains the animal shelter. Does not pick up or catch feral cats. 92960 Southport Lane Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday noon-4pm Email (541) 751-2480 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include criminal investigations, public records requests, concealed handgun license (CHL) classes, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services, including animal control, pet shelter information, and additional resources. 63333 W Highway 20 Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 388-6655 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services which includes cruelty investigations, stray pets, code enforcement, and dog licensing. 1036 SE Douglas Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-4471 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GILLIAM COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include emergency management, fingerprinting, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services including animal control. 221 S Oregon Street Condon, OR 97823 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 351-9530 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY SPAY/NEUTER CLINIC DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person dog licensing and redemption services. 723 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Licensing Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 1:30pm-3:30pm Dog Redemptions: By appointment only Email (503) 583-2780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 309 State Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 386-2711 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a shelter for lost, stray, abandoned, or unwanted animals. Offers pet licensing, regulation compliance, and pet adoption. Accepts reports for animal bites. 5595 S Pacific Highway Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 11am-4pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm Email (541) 774-6654 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE KLAMATH COUNTY ANIMAL CONTROL ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal-based services including animal control, investigating cases of neglect, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 4250 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Lobby hours: Monday-Friday noon-4pm Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 882-1279 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services, licensing, investigating animal cruelty complaints, assisting injured/sick animals and reports of aggressive dog behavior. Offers a spay/neuter voucher program. 3050 N Delta Highway Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3645 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE LINN COUNTY SHERIFF’S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a platform to place complaints about animals and reports about lost dogs. Also offers information about adoptable dogs. 3008 SW Ferry Street Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, closed major holidays (541) 967-3925 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following services: -Enforces dog licensing and control ordinances -Promotes the humane treatment of dogs -Provides shelter and care for stray dogs until they are reunited with their families or adopted -Dog adoption and fostering 3550 Aumsville Highway SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Dog Services: Monday-Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Enforcement and Complaints: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Adoption: Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-6pm, Saturday 11am-3pm Email (503) 588-5233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up injured or aggressive animals and loose livestock, issues dog and cat licenses, investigates animal cruelty, and enforces animal control laws. Accepts stray animals from Multnomah County as space allows, and takes a limited number of owner-surrendered pets. Adoption services include vaccinations, exams, licenses, and spaying/neutering. Also removes dead stray animals and wildlife from public property. Volunteer opportunities are available, and donations are welcome. 1700 W Historic Columbia River Highway Troutdale, OR 97060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shelter: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4:30pm Customer Service phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-5:30pm, Wednesday 1pm-4:30pm, Saturday/Sunday 9am-4:30pm Animal-related emergency calls: 7 days per week 8am-5pm. Dial 911 for after-hours animal emergencies. Email (503) 988-7387 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY VECTOR CONTROL AND CODE ENFORCEMENT TITLE 13 BEES AND LIVESTOCK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about city requirements for keeping honeybees and livestock in an urban environment. Livestock animals include but are not limited to: chickens, turkeys, pigs, rabbits, goats, horses, and cattle. 5235 N Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3:30pm Email (503) 988-7700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF FISH AND WILDLIFE INJURED WILDLIFE REPORTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Takes reports of sick, injured, stranded, or orphaned land and marine animals. Removing or capturing wildlife from the wild and keeping it in captivity without a permit is against the law. It is considered a Class A misdemeanor, punishable by up to one year in jail and a $6250 fine. 4034 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (866) 968-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include fingerprinting, search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal control services, including pet licensing. 850 Main Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 623-9251 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up stray dogs, cares for stray pets until owners can be contacted, and finds homes for animals not picked up by owners. Provides removal of dead cats or dogs (from public property and roadways only). Investigates cruelty/neglect cases and provides community education about animal care/behavior. Provides dog and puppy licensing services. 1901 SE 24th Avenue MS 53 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 846-7041 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BENTON COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE CITY OF ALBANY ANIMAL CONTROL CITY OF BAKER CITY ANIMAL CONTROL CITY OF BEND REPORT AN ISSUE CITY OF BOARDMAN ANIMAL CONTROL CITY OF EUGENE CITY OF EUGENE ANIMAL SERVICES CITY OF ONTARIO CITY OF ONTARIO POLICE DEPARTMENT CITY OF THE DALLES CITY OF THE DALLES POLICE DEPARTMENT CLACKAMAS COUNTY DOG SERVICES DOG SERVICES CLATSOP COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL COLUMBIA COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE COOS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL SHELTER DESCHUTES COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL GILLIAM COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY DOG LICENSING & REDEMPTION HOOD RIVER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES KLAMATH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES LANE COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES LINN COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES MARION COUNTY DOG SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY VECTOR CONTROL AND CODE ENFORCEMENT TITLE 13 BEES AND LIVESTOCK OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF FISH AND WILDLIFE INJURED WILDLIFE REPORTING POLK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES ANIMAL SERVICES
